## Scope check

scaffold-lint is intentionally narrow: stdlib-only, regex/heuristic scaffold detection, no LLM calls.

- [ ] This feature does not add a runtime dependency
- [ ] This feature does not add semantic/LLM analysis (that belongs in a companion tool)
- [ ] This feature does not break the existing output schema, OR I've marked it as a major-version change
